# Test Results Example

Use this template when generating test result reports. Keep the same scenarios as the corresponding test plan. Do not add test case tables or potential bugs — leave blank for the tester to fill.

---

# TEST RESULTS

**Testing Iteration:** [Number]

**Environment / Areas of system used for testing / tested:**
- [List devices and OS versions used]

---

## Test Actions / Scenarios

**Scenario 1: [Same title as in test plan]**
- Result: PASS / FAIL
- Notes: [Observations]

**Scenario 2: [Same title as in test plan]**
- Result: PASS / FAIL
- Notes: [Observations]

**Scenario 3 (Edge Case): [Same title as in test plan]**
- Result: PASS / FAIL
- Notes: [Observations]

**Scenario 4 (Edge Case): [Same title as in test plan]**
- Result: PASS / FAIL
- Notes: [Observations]

---

**Overall Result:** TEST PASSED / TEST FAILED

**Bugs / Defects Raised:** [ID or Description, or "None"]
